nodalDepartmentName.label: Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste (SC) Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: Launched in 1976-77, the "Post Matric College Scholarship" is a scheme by the Scheduled Caste Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme provides financial assistance to encourage Scheduled Caste students to pursue higher education. One-third of the subsistence allowance is payable to students residing in departmental hostels who are provided free lodging and boarding facilities.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Post-matric students are provided with scholarships.
schemeContent.briefDescription: Launched in 1976-77, the "Post Matric College Scholarship" is a scheme by the Scheduled Caste Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme provides financial assistance to encourage Scheduled Caste students to pursue higher education.
schemeContent.exclusions_md:
1. Non-Govt Institutions: Students whose parents' income exceeds ₹2.50 lakh are not eligible for the subsistence allowance.
1. Govt Institutions: Students with an income above ₹2.50 lakh are not eligible for the subsistence allowance but are eligible for full fee reimbursement.
1. Sambal Yojana Families: Students from Sambal Yojana families do not have to pay fees at government schools and are not eligible for fee reimbursement.

children.text: Launched in 1976-77, the "Post Matric College Scholarship" is a scheme by the Scheduled Caste Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme provides financial assistance to encourage Scheduled Caste students to pursue higher education. One-third of the subsistence allowance is payable to students residing in departmental hostels who are provided free lodging and boarding facilities.
Post-matric students are provided with scholarships.
Non-Govt Institutions: Students whose parents' income exceeds ₹2.50 lakh are not eligible for the subsistence allowance.
Govt Institutions: Students with an income above ₹2.50 lakh are not eligible for the subsistence allowance but are eligible for full fee reimbursement.
Sambal Yojana Families: Students from Sambal Yojana families do not have to pay fees at government schools and are not eligible for fee reimbursement.
Scroll down the page and find the "Student Corner" section on the left side of the screen.
Under the Student Corner, click on the “Student Registration” option.
Complete the online registration form by filling in all mandatory fields and uploading the required documents in the specified format and size.
Carefully review the details entered and the documents uploaded. Once you have verified everything, click on the "Submit" button.
After submitting, you will receive your registration number on the registered email address or mobile number.
Scroll down to the "Student Corner" section on the left and click on "Student Login." Enter your User ID and Password to log in.
After logging in, a dashboard will appear in front of you. From your dashboard, select the scheme you wish to apply for and click on it.
Complete the application form by filling in all required fields and uploading necessary documents in the specified format and size.
Double-check the information and documents provided, then click on the "Submit" button to submit your application.

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Registration Process:** **Step1:** Go to the official [State Scholarship Portal 2.0](https://scholarshipportal.mp.nic.in/Index.aspx) for Madhya Pradesh. **Step2:** Scroll down the page and find the "Student Corner" section on the left side of the screen. **Step3:** Under the Student Corner, click on the “Student Registration” option. **Step4:** Complete the online registration form by filling in all mandatory fields and uploading the required documents in the specified format and size. **Step5:** Carefully review the details entered and the documents uploaded. Once you have verified everything, click on the "Submit" button. **Step6:** After submitting, you will receive your registration number on the registered email address or mobile number.
**Application Process:** **Step1:** Go to the [State Scholarship Portal 2.0](https://scholarshipportal.mp.nic.in/Index.aspx) for Madhya Pradesh. **Step2:** Scroll down to the "Student Corner" section on the left and click on "Student Login." Enter your User ID and Password to log in. **Step3:** After logging in, a dashboard will appear in front of you. From your dashboard, select the scheme you wish to apply for and click on it. **Step4:** Complete the application form by filling in all required fields and uploading necessary documents in the specified format and size. **Step5:** Double-check the information and documents provided, then click on the "Submit" button to submit your application.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant must be a student. 1. The student should belong to the Scheduled Caste category. 1. The student must come from a family with an income limit of up to ₹6.00 lakh to qualify.
**Note:** One-third of the subsistence allowance will be payable to students residing in departmental hostels who are provided with free lodging/boarding facilities.

children.text: The applicant must be a student.
The student should belong to the Scheduled Caste category.
The student must come from a family with an income limit of up to ₹6.00 lakh to qualify.
One-third of the subsistence allowance will be payable to students residing in departmental hostels who are provided with free lodging/boarding facilities.
